name: wigai
description: Control Bitwig Studio from Claude — transport, devices, tracks, clips, scenes, and one-click Bitwig device insertion.
long_description:
WigAI turns Bitwig Studio into an MCP-controllable instrument. The WigAI Bitwig extension runs an embedded MCP server inside Bitwig (default `http://localhost:61169/mcp`); this Desktop Extension bundles a stdio↔HTTP proxy so Claude Desktop can connect to it with a single click — no JSON configuration required.

**Prerequisite:** Bitwig Studio must be running with the WigAI `.bwextension` installed and activated. See the WigAI repository for the extension download and setup.

**Capabilities:** transport control, device parameter read/write, track & scene listing, clip & scene launching, and inserting Bitwig-native devices by UUID.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get a full snapshot of transport, project, selected track and device

tools.name: transport_start
tools.description: Start transport playback

tools.name: transport_stop
tools.description: Stop transport playback

tools.name: get_selected_device_parameters
tools.description: Read parameters of the selected device

tools.name: set_selected_device_parameter
tools.description: Set one parameter of the selected device

tools.name: set_selected_device_parameters
tools.description: Set multiple parameters of the selected device

tools.name: get_device_details
tools.description: Get device details and remote controls

tools.name: list_tracks
tools.description: List all tracks, optionally filtered by type

tools.name: get_track_details
tools.description: Get detailed info for a track incl. sends and clips

tools.name: list_devices_on_track
tools.description: List devices on a track

tools.name: launch_clip
tools.description: Launch a clip by track name and clip index

tools.name: session_launchSceneByIndex
tools.description: Launch a scene by index

tools.name: session_launchSceneByName
tools.description: Launch a scene by name

tools.name: list_scenes
tools.description: List all scenes

tools.name: get_clips_in_scene
tools.description: Get clip slots in a scene

tools.name: list_bitwig_devices
tools.description: List known Bitwig devices with their UUIDs

tools.name: insert_bitwig_device
tools.description: Insert a device (native, VST3, CLAP, or VST2) into a track by ID/UUID

tools.name: create_track
tools.description: Create a new track (audio, instrument, effect, or group)

tools.name: rename_track
tools.description: Rename a track by its index

tools.name: delete_selected_device
tools.description: Delete the currently selected device

tools.name: select_next_device
tools.description: Select the next device in the chain

tools.name: select_previous_device
tools.description: Select the previous device in the chain

tools.name: select_first_device
tools.description: Select the first device in the chain

tools.name: select_track
tools.description: Select/focus a track by index

tools.name: set_track_parameter
tools.description: Set track volume, pan, mute, solo, or arm

tools.name: set_device_bypass
tools.description: Bypass or activate a device by track and device index

tools.name: configure_transport
tools.description: Set tempo, metronome, loop, or record-arm

server_url.title: WigAI Server URL
server_url.description: URL of the MCP server embedded in the WigAI Bitwig extension. Change only if you customized the port in Bitwig's WigAI preferences.
